chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Theft

text: 5113 - وَ سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنْ أَدْنَى مَا يُقْطَعُ فِيهِ اَلسَّارِقُ قَالَ "رُبُعُ دِينَارٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5113 - Abu Abdullah (as) was asked about the minimum amount for which a thief's hand is to be cut off.
Imam (as) said: "A quarter of a dinar."
